author: obajunior1
content:
Please 🙏 
Does anyone know why Protocol Guild administrators don’t act to unpause their Deprecated Pilot Contract Pass-through wallet that held certain guild members assets since few years ago ? Now the contract has 0$ completion and inactivity but still Guild Administrators still not able to unpause their Deprecated Pilot pass-through wallet to keep Ethereum Transparency.
